title: Immunostaining of iPSC-derived neurons
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"crbme","text":"Here, we fix, permeabilize, and stain human iPSC-derived neurons for the purpose of observing and quantifying somal and axonal abundance of proteins of interest. For preceding culture of neurons, see \"Protocol: Culture and transfection of iPSC-derived neurons for live-imaging of axonal cargoes.\"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"48oce","text":"Bouin's solution (Sigma, HT10132)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9n941","text":"BrainPhys Neuronal Medium (Stemcell Technologies, Cat# 05790)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dj97o","text":"Methanol, Optima LC/MS grade (Thermo Fisher, A456-4)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"40v64","text":"35 mm imaging dish, 20 mm glass diameter (Mattek, p35g-1-5-20-c)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3so5h","text":"18mm circular coverglass (Electron Microscopy Sciences, Cat# 72222-01)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4jh8q","text":"Prolong Gold Antifade Mountant (Thermo Fisher, P36930)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Replace culture media in dish with 1 mL room temperature BrainPhys culture media (Stemcell Technologies)
Add 1 mL Bouin's solution (Sigma). Incubate at room temperature for 30 minutes.
Wash at least 5 times with PBS. Yellow color should be absent.
Permeabilize in ice-cold Optima methanol (Thermo Fisher) at -20 degrees C for 8 minutes.
Block for one hour (5% goat serum and 1% BSA in PBS).
Incubate in primary antibody in blocking solution for 1 hour at room temperature.
Incubate in secondary antibody in blocking solution for 1 hour at room temperature.
Remove PBS and add 40 µL Prolong Gold (Thermo Fisher). Using forceps, apply coverglass.
creator: Dan Dou
